mapper.sql: b.eucr_id, b.batch_no, b.crdt_type_cd, b.sub_qty, b.prgrm_nm, b.vntg_yr, b.mthdlgy_id, b.crdt_no_from, b.crdt_no_to, b.cncl_dt, b.use_bgng_dt, b.use_end_dt, b.frst_reg_dt, b.frst_reg_user_id, b.last_chg_dt, b.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_eucr_batch b WHERE b.eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND NOW() BETWEEN b.use_bgng_dt AND b.use_end_dt ORDER BY b.batch_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_eucr_batch (eucr_id, batch_no, crdt_type_cd, sub_qty, prgrm_nm, vntg_yr, mthdlgy_id, crdt_no_from, crdt_no_to, cncl_dt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{eucrId}, #{batchNo}, #{crdtTypeCd}, #{subQty}, #{prgrmNm}, #{vntgYr}, #{mthdlgyId}, #{crdtNoFrom}, #{crdtNoTo}, #{cnclDt}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_eucr_batch SET crdt_type_cd = #{crdtTypeCd}, sub_qty = #{subQty}, prgrm_nm = #{prgrmNm}, vntg_yr = #{vntgYr}, mthdlgy_id = #{mthdlgyId}, crdt_no_from = #{crdtNoFrom}, crdt_no_to = #{crdtNoTo}, cncl_dt = #{cnclDt}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND batch_no = #{batchNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
